$description: Handlebars grammar REFERENCE CHECKLIST for the #2113 grammar-fidelity scorecard — WE-owned data, not scorer code. Scored against BUNDLE ZERO (FUI's native mustache+polymer recipes, frontierui:plugs/webnodes/recipes/interpolationRecipes.ts) it reveals what FUI's native grammar cannot yet express — the gap list that seeds the Handlebars/Mustache bundle story (#2114). Each construct names its opening delimiter + expected #2074 nature; outOfScope marks the delimiter-grammar concerns the #2074 statute does NOT own (attribute-keyed → #1986 registry; attribute-value interpolation → sibling surface, per we:docs/agent/block-standard.md#custom-node-recipes rule 5). The scorer (frontierui:plugs/webnodes/grammarScorecard.ts scoreGrammar) grades each construct reproduced/partial/out-of-scope/gap. This checklist carries ZERO scorer logic — swapping it for another framework's is what proves the scorer framework-agnostic (#2113).
